pages.text:
ВАЗИРИ КОРХОИ ХОРИЧИИ

ЧУМХУРИИ ТОЧИКИСТОН

MINISTER OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

REPUBLIC OF TAJIKISTAN

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was done at

Paris on 22 November 1928;

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplemented by the Protocol of 30 November 1972, the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988;

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the said Protocol provides that the Protocol shall remain open for accession by Governments Parties to the 1928 Convention after 29

November 1973;

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Republic of Tajikistan, hereby accedes to the 1928 Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fulfill and carry out all provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, Hamrokhon ZARIFI, Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Tajikistan, have signed this Instrument of Accession and caused the

Seal of the Ministry o f Foreign A ffairs of the Republic o f Tajikistan to be hereunto affixed.

Done at Dushanbe on the fifteenth day of November in the year of two thousand and seven.

Hamrokhon ZARIFI
